name: Roast Lemon Chicken (for 4)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut one lemon into 8 pieces.
2. Rub the outside of a well-cleaned, dry chicken with the peel side of the lemon pieces.
3. Place the lemon inside the chicken and include the garlic cloves.
4. Season the chicken well with salt and pepper.
5. Mix equal parts olive oil (preferably extra virgin) and butter to create an oil mixture; pour this over the top and inside the chicken.
6. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
7. Roast the chicken for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
8. About 30 minutes before removing the chicken from the oven, pour freshly squeezed lemon juice from the second lemon over it and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
That's all there is to it. Enjoy a simple yet delicious dish that everyone loves.
